posts.author: Merav (Merav)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’d like to create the following automation:

When any of a specific group of fields (some standard, some custom) are updated, a Webhook should be triggered.

The Webhook should include the current values of all the fields that could have triggered the automation.

The automation should run only if a certain field is not empty.

Is this possible to configure?

Thanks.
